# Artham Aesthetique

> Dr-led skin, hair and body wellness clinic in Noida, India. Led by Dr. Omaima Jawed. Part of the Artham family of healthcare brands.

## About
Artham Aesthetique is the dermatology & aesthetics vertical of the Artham parent brand. We offer FDA-approved, personalised protocols across skin, anti-ageing, laser hair removal, hair restoration, body contouring and bridal programmes.

## Location
Lotus Plaza, near Mithaas Sweets, Hazipur, Sector 104, Noida, Uttar Pradesh 201304, India
Phone: +91 98119 97993
Hours: Monday to Saturday, 10am - 8pm

## Doctor
Dr. Omaima Jawed — Dermatologist, Artham Aesthetique. Specialises in acne, pigmentation, anti-ageing injectables, lasers and hair restoration.

## Treatments (6 categories)
- Skin: HydraFacial, Derma Genesis, Hello Bright by ZO Obagi, Chemical Peel, Micro Needling, Vampire Facial / PRP, PDRN Skin Boosters, NAD+ IV Therapy, 4D ClearLift, Acne Treatment, and more.
- Anti-Ageing: Dermal Fillers, Mesobotox, Opus Plasma, HIFU, Morpheus, Skin Tightening, Hydration Injections.
- Laser Hair Removal: Overview, Men, Women.
- Hair: Advanced Hair Transplant, Hair Loss Treatment, Hair Patch Treatment.
- Body Contouring / Weight Management: CoolSculpting, Med Contour, Body Shaping, Contour Cheeks, Weight Loss, Chin Enhancement, Jawline Definition, Face Lifting.
- Bridal: Pre-bridal Wedding Package (skin, hair, body).

## Booking
Book a consultation with Dr. Omaima Jawed via /book (3-step flow) or WhatsApp +91 98119 97993.
